notes: Can be used as both an adjective and an adverb. The phrase 'ehrlich gesagt' means 'honestly speaking / to be honest'.

sentences.german: Er ist immer ehrlich zu seinen Freunden.
sentences.english: He is always honest with his friends.

sentences.german: Ehrlich gesagt, verstehe ich das Problem nicht.
sentences.english: To be honest, I don't understand the problem.
